mapper.select: SELECT rb.id, rb.bill_no, rb.contract_id, rb.house_id, rb.landlord_id, rb.tenant_user_id, rb.bill_type, rb.bill_month, rb.utility_payment_mode, rb.rent_amount, rb.deposit_amount, rb.water_amount, rb.electric_amount, rb.total_amount, rb.due_date, rb.remark, rb.utility_proof_url, rb.utility_proof_status, rb.utility_proof_note, rb.pay_status, rb.paid_time, rb.create_time, rb.update_time, rc.contract_no, rc.title AS contract_title, h.name AS house_name, h.cover AS house_cover, lu.username AS landlord_name, tu.username AS tenant_name FROM rental_bill rb LEFT JOIN rental_contract rc ON rc.id = rb.contract_id LEFT JOIN house h ON h.id = rb.house_id LEFT JOIN landlord l ON l.id = rb.landlord_id LEFT JOIN user lu ON lu.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN user tu ON tu.id = rb.tenant_user_id WHERE rb.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM rental_bill WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND pay_status = 1
